title: agrostis wacei
intro: Agrostis wacei, also known as Wace's bent grass or Wace's grass, is a perennial grass species native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Agrostis wacei include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis wacei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Agrostis wacei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine practices.
